learning: New hardware node deployed: OPERATOR by BlackRoad - ESP32 CEO Hub touchscreen at ~/ceo-hub-esp32. Physical device with HOT/NOT/SKIP buttons, WiFi-connected, integrated with 5 SSH nodes (lucidia, shellfish, octavia, alice, aria). Official BlackRoad gradient colors. Serial: /dev/cu.usbserial-110. See OPERATOR_AGENT_GUIDE.md for full integration docs.
